description: Reviewed standard-scoped alignment aliases for H4G textbook-unit matching. These aliases do not change official standard text and must not be treated as global subject synonyms.

aliases.rationale: The H4G8 real-number standard explicitly includes 二次根式; 人教八下 16.1 二次根式 and 冀教八下 15.1 二次根式 are grade-appropriate unit titles.
aliases.note: Do not generalize this into a global 实数 alias because H4G7 实数 near misses include unsafe 数轴/有理数 units.

aliases.rationale: The H4G8 definition/proposition/theorem/proof standard explicitly mentions 反证法; 冀教八下 17.5 反证法 is a narrow proof-method unit.
aliases.note: This is scoped to the proof standard only and is not a general substitute for 命题、定理与证明.

aliases.rationale: The H4G9 projection/view/net standard includes 投影、视图 and 三视图 concepts; 人教九下 第二十九章 投影与视图 / 29.1 投影 / 29.2 三视图 are direct title matches.
aliases.note: 展开图 evidence remains provided by 冀教 32.3; this alias only recovers 人教 projection/view units after page-start recovery.

terms: 生物与环境的相互关系
editions: 浙教版-浙江教育出版社
unit_titles: 第1节 生物与环境的相互关系
aliases.rationale: The H4G9 ecosystem-balance standard states that students should explain ecosystem material/energy flow, biodiversity, ecological balance, environmental protection, and ecological security; 浙教版九年级《第1节 生物与环境的相互关系》 is a same-grade unit in the same concept chain and was surfaced by the science alias source review packet.
aliases.note: This alias is restricted to SC-H4G9-ECO-006, 浙教版, and the exact unit title. Do not generalize 生物与环境 into a global science alias or use this entry for H4G7/H4G8 ecosystem standards.

editions: 华东师大版-华东师范大学出版社
aliases.rationale: The H4G9 energy-conservation standard explicitly includes 热机 and the practice field asks students to study 热机 energy-consumption problems; 华东师大版九年级《3 热机》 is a same-grade exact title match surfaced by the science alias source review packet.
aliases.note: This alias is restricted to SC-H4G9-ENE-003, 华东师大版, and the exact unit title. Do not generalize 热机 into a global energy alias or use nearby 机械能、比热容、简单机械 units without separate source review.

editions: 华东师大版-华东师范大学出版社
aliases.rationale: The H4G7 classification standard explicitly asks students to list the main characteristics of viruses, bacteria, and fungi and their relationship to human life; 华东师大版七年级《3 细菌和真菌》 is a same-grade exact title match surfaced by the science alias source review packet.
aliases.note: This alias is restricted to SC-H4G7-LIFE-004, 华东师大版, and the exact unit title. Do not use this entry for broader biology taxonomy units or unrelated 人类生活 keyword matches.

aliases.rationale: The H4G9 evolution standard explicitly requires students to state Darwin's natural selection theory and recognize biological evolution; 武汉版九年级《1.1 自然选择》 is a same-grade exact title match surfaced by the science alias source review packet.
aliases.note: This alias is restricted to SC-H4G9-EVOL-018, 武汉版, and the exact unit title. Do not generalize 自然选择 into unrelated evolution evidence without separate source review.

editions: 浙教版-浙江教育出版社
unit_titles: 第4节 牛顿第一定律
aliases.rationale: The H4G7 motion-and-force standard explicitly includes 牛顿第一定律 and 二力平衡; 武汉版七年级《2.3 二力平衡》 and 浙教版七年级《第4节 牛顿第一定律》 are same-grade page-ready unit title matches surfaced by the science alias source review packet.
aliases.note: This alias is restricted to SC-H4G7-MOT-001, 武汉版/浙教版, and the exact unit titles. Do not generalize 力、平衡、运动, or 物体 into global motion aliases or use this entry for H4G8/H4G9 motion standards.

editions: 沪教版-上海教育出版社
华东师大版-华东师范大学出版社
aliases.rationale: The H4G7 human-impact standard explicitly covers air quality, air pollution prevention, soil pollution, land desertification, and water-soil conservation; 沪教版七年级《第四章 空气质量》 and 华东师大版七年级《3 人类活动与土壤》 are same-grade page-ready unit title matches surfaced by the science alias source review packet.
aliases.note: This alias is restricted to SC-H4G7-ENV-007, 沪教版/华东师大版, and the exact unit titles. Do not generalize 环境、人类活动, or 土壤 into broad aliases, and do not use this entry for H4G8/H4G9 environment standards.
